scene: منتج البطل: بيكيز — لقطة استوديو شهية للمنتج الحقيقي · A studio setup with a clean, reflective surface to enhance the glossy appeal of the food, against a deep brick-crimson red background with a radial glow that fades into dark maroon at the edges. · Two identical 'التوأم' burgers as the hero, positioned slightly overlapping to emphasize the 'twin' concept. · props: A navy-blue ALBAIK soda can and the white ALBAIK fries bag placed strategically in the background, slightly blurred to maintain focus on the burgers. · composition: The burgers are positioned at a slight angle from each other, with the front burger slightly forward and the second burger slightly behind and to the side, creating a dynamic visual of the pairing. The soda can is placed on the left side and the fries bag on the right, both slightly further back to frame the burgers. · light: A single hard key light from above slightly to the front, creating crisp specular highlights on the glossy sauce and molten cheese, with deep contact shadows under the burgers and a reflective sheen on the bun. · mood: Celebratory and appetizing, with a focus on the rich textures and vibrant colors of the ALBAIK brand, evoking a sense of indulgence and culinary enjoyment.
prompt:
[BRAND LOCK — identity invariant, composition open]
The provided reference teaches the بيكيز fragrance bottle identity — form, glass, cap, label, signature details. Identity DNA, preserved across any camera angle: A loose pile of BROASTED golden-crispy boneless, skinless chicken-breast strips — irregular, knobbly, deeply golden tenders with a thick craggy fried crumb crust, served bare on a warm wooden board (no bun). 5 pieces per portion. Available regular or spicy (حرّاق, with the red chili-flame badge). Always plated to show the crunch and steam, with Albaik's white garlic ثومية and orange cocktail (مسحب) sauce as the dip alongside. SIGNATURE CUE — the product must read by its white garlic sauce (ثومية).
Staging surface, oud-context styling, and camera height are creative decisions; the bottle reads brand-accurate — true glass form, cap, label characters (Latin AND Arabic character-perfect — Arabic wordmark fidelity is the highest-risk identity element), brand color, brand-readable face toward camera. INTEGRATION: one warm key holds bottle, staging, and atmosphere — its refraction through the glass, its gleam on the gold, its glow in any bukhoor wisp are a single luxury light system.

[REALISM & CAPTURE CHARACTER]
Capture character: film_grain_warmth — opulent fragrance cinema, subtle warm grain. Material truth: crisp golden-brown crust with honest oil sheen and visible craggy texture; tender steam-moist interior where broken; true fried-food surface, never plastic-uniform; product-truth texture: broasted/crispy; signature white garlic sauce (ثومية) — real glass refraction, honest reflectance, true liquid color within; authentic cap material (metal/weighted); real texture on luxury surfaces. No plastic-perfect glass, no artificial sparkle.

[SCALE CALIBRATION]
Each strip ≈ 9–11 cm long, ≈ 2.5 cm wide; each breaded shrimp ≈ 4–5 cm. Scale-anchor = served as a small pile in a paper boat / on the combo plate; a strip ≈ 0.8× the ALBAIK can height laid horizontal; 3–4 strips fill one paper boat. — true bottle size on real staging anchors: oud chips at honest centimeter scale, a brass burner at true vessel size, the gold tray proportioned to the bottle it presents.

[FRAMING & PROXIMITY]
Close and reverent — the glowing bottle commanding the frame, the oud-luxury world pressing warm and near, deep dark beyond.

[COLOR & CONTRAST]
Saudi oud-luxury palette — amber, gold, deep brown warmth; the bottle's brand color from Two brand-owned color fields only: (1) ALBAIK signature deep brick-crimson red (≈ a rich tomato-to-maroon red, NOT a generic KFC bright red — it reads slightly cooler and deeper), almost always rendered as a center-bright radial glow falling to dark maroon at the edges; (2) ALBAIK golden-yellow (the price-disc / wordmark / packaging-pattern yellow). A deep navy-blue field is the owned occasion variant (night/Eid/Ramadan/fish). White is the owned neutral (the packaging bag). A color-blocking chain may fill the frame ONLY from {crimson-red, golden-yellow, navy-blue, white} — never a borrowed reference red/orange. and the liquid's true hue glow as the treasured hero against the deep opulent surround.

[LIGHT & LENS]
ONE warm directional luxury key modeling the bottle and catching glass refraction, a warm rim within the same system for separation, deep falloff into opulent dark. Bottle sharp, staging soft, background deep.

[NATURAL PLACEMENT]
The bottle stands plumb on its rich surface (dark marble, polished wood, gold tray) — true weighted contact, real mirror-kiss on a polished surface.

[COMPANION ELEMENTS]
ONE hero companion from One hero companion: the white ALBAIK garlic-sauce dip cup (the dip is the strips/shrimp ritual). Restrained extras: the fries bag, a lemon wedge for the shrimp. ONE hero companion only. (oud wood chips OR a brass incense burner with a bukhoor wisp OR a gold accent) — authentic Saudi fragrance signifiers (CS-19), restrained, never crowding the jewel.

[SCENE]
Creative seed (from the system): منتج البطل: بيكيز — لقطة استوديو شهية للمنتج الحقيقي · A studio setup with a clean, reflective surface to enhance the glossy appeal of the food, against a deep brick-crimson red background with a radial glow that fades into dark maroon at the edges. · Two identical 'التوأم' burgers as the hero, positioned slightly overlapping to emphasize the 'twin' concept. · props: A navy-blue ALBAIK soda can and the white ALBAIK fries bag placed strategically in the background, slightly blurred to maintain focus on the burgers. · composition: The burgers are positioned at a slight angle from each other, with the front burger slightly forward and the second burger slightly behind and to the side, creating a dynamic visual of the pairing. The soda can is placed on the left side and the fries bag on the right, both slightly further back to frame the burgers. · light: A single hard key light from above slightly to the front, creating crisp specular highlights on the glossy sauce and molten cheese, with deep contact shadows under the burgers and a reflective sheen on the bun. · mood: Celebratory and appetizing, with a focus on the rich textures and vibrant colors of the ALBAIK brand, evoking a sense of indulgence and culinary enjoyment.
Premium fragrance showcase. The bottle as glowing hero in deep luxury staging — a rich surface, warm directional light, the chosen oud-context companion, deep luxurious surround falling to opulent dark. Sophisticated, prestigious, the luxury of fine fragrance and oud. Choice points: surface, companion selection, camera height, warm-dark depth.

[SUBJECT]
The fragrance bottle as luxury hero — glass refraction, true liquid color, cap material, staging in full physical truth.

[BRAND CONSTRAINTS]
Single fragrance bottle hero. Authentic Saudi luxury staging (CS-19). No human elements. Deep opulent surround. No readable text beyond the bottle's own label. no cartoon/illustration/stylized rendering, no oversaturation, no plastic CGI uniformity, no borrowed reference colours, no readable text on neighbouring objects

[OUTPUT]
Photoreal luxury fragrance photography, maximum fidelity. Opulent warm grade, glowing bottle hero, true liquid color. No overlay text, no watermark.

[SAUDI ADAPTATION — conditional]
authentic contemporary Saudi setting — true materials, never generic-Arabian — oud/bukhoor staging is core to the Saudi fragrance market (CS-19): oud chips, brass burner, gold elements. real Saudi-context materials — brass dallah, sadu textile, palm, true regional surfaces fills authentic luxury surfaces. For Eid: gold particle haze in the warm air.

[CREATIVE VARIANCE DIRECTIVE]
Vary across generations: staging surface, companion selection, camera height, warm-dark depth, refraction emphasis. The jewel is presented anew each time; its identity never wavers.
